infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AutoPark AI needs access to your location to detect when you arrive at saved parking locations and automatically book parking.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: AutoPark AI needs background location access to monitor your arrival at saved locations even when the app is not in use.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: AutoPark AI needs background location access to monitor your arrival at saved locations even when the app is not in use.

plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: AutoPark AI needs background location access to monitor your arrival at saved locations and automatically book parking for you.
